description: You are a patrol dispatcher at the Los Santos Communications Center (Dispatch ID: DISP-01). Officer 4A-07 has initiated a traffic stop at Forum Drive and Strawberry Avenue on a Bravado Buffalo (plate 63JIG803) for running a red light. The registered owner, Franklin Clinton, is cooperating; however, the front passenger has fled eastbound on foot — described as a Black male, athletic build, wearing a gray hoodie and dark jeans. Document this incident by creating a traffic stop call in the CAD Console at Forum Drive and Strawberry Avenue with a narrative covering the circumstances. Issue a formal citation to Franklin Clinton for 'Running Red Light' with a fine of $175.00 and file a person BOLO for the fleeing passenger with his physical description. Access the system at http://localhost using credentials admin@opencad.local / Admin123!.
